phases.name: GitHub Security Sync
phases.details: Attempted to set repo to private. Implemented fallback via Env var stripping.

phases.name: Secrets Management (No-Client-Secrets)
phases.details: Verified the removal of VITE_FIREBASE_API_KEY from pure client code where possible and the complete isolation of CRYPTO_PEPPER to backend context and safe localized fallback.

phases.name: Offline-First Resilience
phases.details: Service worker logic, persistence local overrides, and auto-sync fallback checks are in place.

phases.name: Data Backup
phases.details: ZIP backup creation script explicitly confirmed operational.
